result.seo_title: Beginner Upper/Lower Split Workout Plan with Cardio - 4 Weeks
result.seo_content: Start your fitness journey with this beginner-friendly 4-week workout plan focusing on upper/lower body split combined with cardio. Designed to build strength and endurance gradually, this plan is ideal for newcomers looking to improve overall fitness with 4 sessions per week. Each session lasts around 60 minutes, including warm-up, workout, and cool-down. Suitable exercises require minimal equipment, making it easy to perform at home or in the gym.
result.seo_keywords: beginner workout plan, upper lower split, cardio for beginners, 4 week fitness plan, home workout
